title: Performant
description: Provides 10x performance increase with the help of some selected mods.
body:
# Performance

Performant is faster than base minecraft, thanks to modern performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, and others. The bundled mods have been carefully selected to be safe in your worlds and provide noticeable speed benefits on any device.
# Doesn't add extra mods

Performant doesn't add any mod which removes the "Vanilla feel" of minecraft

# Very flexible

Performant does not include content mods, so you can play on any world or server.

# Built on Fabric mod loader

Performant uses the Fabric mod loader, which is lightweight, fast, and supports a lot of mods. You can use the modpack as a base to add your favorite mods to.
